notableEvents.label: Fernando Tatis Jr. pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Fernando Tatis Jr. out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Luke Raley. Manny Machado scores.

notableEvents.label: Jackson Merrill walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Jackson Merrill doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Randy Arozarena. Luis Campusano scores. Ramón Laureano scores.

notableEvents.label: Julio Rodríguez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Julio Rodríguez grounds into a double play, third baseman Manny Machado to second baseman Jake Cronenworth to first baseman Ty France. Brendan Donovan out at 2nd. Julio Rodríguez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Julio Rodríguez rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Julio Rodríguez grounds into a double play, third baseman Manny Machado to second baseman Jake Cronenworth to first baseman Ty France. Brendan Donovan out at 2nd. Julio Rodríguez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
